title: Freddy, die Gitarre und das Meer
actors: Freddy Quinn, Corny Collins, Sabine Sesselmann
plot: Sea-bum Freddy entertains guests with his guitar at the inn Bei Onkel Max. The waitress Susi and journalist Katya both have the hots for Freddy. What they don't know is that he is wanted by the police in St. Pauli.
